faqs.question: What types of ants are common in Franklin Square homes?
faqs.answer: Franklin Square properties commonly experience infestations of carpenter ants, pavement ants, odorous house ants, and pharaoh ants. Carpenter ants are particularly concerning as they can damage wooden structures, while pavement ants typically enter through foundation cracks. Our technicians identify the specific species and customize treatment accordingly.

faqs.answer: Our ant control services in Franklin Square range from $350 to $550, depending on the severity of the infestation, property size, and type of ant species involved. This includes inspection, treatment, and follow-up visits to ensure complete elimination. We provide free estimates and transparent pricing with no hidden fees.

faqs.question: Are your ant control treatments safe for children and pets?
faqs.answer: Yes, we prioritize safety by using EPA-approved, eco-friendly ant control products that are safe for families and pets when applied correctly.
